title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Power Grid Corporation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Power Grid Corporation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Power Grid Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Power Grid Corporation:
Power Grid Corporation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
